testcase.name: test_04_create_driver_with_pin

failure.message: AssertionError: Should be able to login with new PIN assert 401 == 200 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_driver_pin_auth_iter58.py:172: in test_04_create_driver_with_pin assert login_response.status_code == 200, "Should be able to login with new PIN" E AssertionError: Should be able to login with new PIN E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_05_update_driver_pin

failure.message: AssertionError: Should login with original PIN assert 401 == 200 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_driver_pin_auth_iter58.py:231: in test_05_update_driver_pin assert login1.status_code == 200, "Should login with original PIN" E AssertionError: Should login with original PIN E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_07_driver_login_inactive_driver

failure.message: AssertionError: Inactive driver should get 403 assert 401 == 403 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_driver_pin_auth_iter58.py:358: in test_07_driver_login_inactive_driver assert login_response.status_code == 403, "Inactive driver should get 403" E AssertionError: Inactive driver should get 403 E assert 401 == 403 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
